metadata.title: Tribu Nova
metadata.description: A couple-focused app to lighten mental load and organize daily life together, without the overwhelm.
metadata.keywords: couple, mental load, daily life, household balance, family organization, clarity, care
metadata.ogImageAlt: Tribu Nova — less mental load, more clarity

manifest.description: A couple-focused app to lighten mental load and organize daily life together.

emptyState.defaultMessage: There are no items to display yet.

sidebar.addTabAriaLabel: Add a module to the project

moduleLibrary.title: Add a module
moduleLibrary.intro: Shape the project around the household’s real week. Only ready modules that are not already enabled appear here.

preview.title: Soft catalogue, visible quick list, clean shopping handoff

recipes.subtitle: The household meals module, designed to feel desirable as soon as it lands in a project.
recipes.teaser: A premium space to pick recipes, keep the right meals close, and turn the week into a very simple shopping plan.

empty.title: No new module to add right now
empty.description: Modules already enabled disappear from this list, and future modules stay hidden until they are ready.

signup.subtitle: Sign up to start lightening your mental load.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

resendVerification.success: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.

workspaceLoading.title: We are preparing your spaces
workspaceLoading.message: Projects, members, and access rights are on their way. The screen is being assembled before we hand control back to you.

projectLoading.title: The project is taking shape
projectLoading.message: We are loading the board and permissions so the project opens in a ready-to-use state.

workspace.title: Family spaces
workspace.subtitle: Create a workspace or join those you have access to.
workspace.emptyStateCardDescription: Create your first space to organize everyday life as a team and move forward together.
workspace.addWorkspaceButtonAriaLabel: Open form to create a new workspace
workspace.joinWorkspaceButtonAriaLabel: Open form to join a space with an invitation link

workspace.emptyStateMessage: Create a space to share daily tasks, reduce mental load, and stay aligned together.
workspace.createWorkspaceDescription: Give your new workspace a name to get started.
workspace.joinWorkspaceTitle: Join a space with a link
workspace.joinWorkspaceDescription: Paste the invitation link from your partner to join the space.
workspace.pleaseEnterInvitationLink: Please enter an invitation link or token

actions.inviteRoleViewerDescription: Can browse the project without changing its content.
actions.inviteRoleMemberDescription: Can collaborate on tickets and everyday project work.
actions.inviteRoleAdminDescription: Can manage members, settings, and project structure.

reclaimable.sectionDescription: These projects were associated with your email and can be recovered before they are permanently deleted.

onboarding.title: Get oriented on the board

onboarding.reviewDescription: Restart the full onboarding whenever you want to revisit ticket creation, assignment, and comments.
onboarding.genericError: Unable to update your onboarding preferences.

project.title: Project information
project.subtitle: Pick a board icon and project name. The project code stays two letters, without emoji.

delete.modalDescription: Type the project name to confirm permanent deletion.

people.title: Members and invitations

people.advancedRolesLocked: The Viewer role requires the {plan} plan. Existing viewers remain visible until their next role change.

fields.title: Title
fields.notesPlaceholder: Add a few helpful notes for the household...

archived.bannerDescription: This task no longer appears on the active board. You can unarchive it to bring it back into the flow.

empty.title: No recipe matches the current filters.
empty.description: Try a shorter search or remove a filter to reopen the catalog.

card.quickListUpdateFailed: The quick list could not be updated.

errors.validateAddition: Addition validation failed. Please try again.

create.title: Create a recipe
create.description: A more direct screen to capture the idea, structure the base, and save the recipe cleanly.

edit.title: Edit recipe
edit.description: A readable editing sheet to adjust the base, additions, and steps without losing the thread.

aside.title: V1 frame
aside.ruleFallback: Fallback keeps `amountText` when the quantity stays free-form.
aside.ruleReorder: Reordering stays simple with up / down buttons.

header.localDraftHelper: Press the "Create recipe" button at the very bottom to save it.
header.descriptionCreate: Start with the title, then fill the useful blocks just like on the task update screen.
header.descriptionEdit: Adjust the recipe block by block with the same compact reading as on the task update screen.

identity.title: The cues that make the recipe recognizable
identity.description: The title stays visible at the top, then we complete the image, time, servings, and summary.

tags.title: Project tags, without duplicates
tags.description: Suggestions reuse already-used tags and the slug prevents duplicates.

validatedIngredients.title: The stable base of the recipe

additionIngredients.title: Variations to test without blurring the base
additionIngredients.description: Additions stay persistent, but clearly identified as hypotheses or variants.

steps.title: A sequence of short, easy-to-reuse blocks
steps.description: Each step keeps a clear instruction and an optional marker for easier rereading.

note.title: Testing feedback or personal reminder
note.description: Optional, but useful to keep a decision after testing.

summary.title: Check before saving
summary.description: A quick preview of the sheet as it will be reread later.

coverImageUrl.label: Image
coverImageUrl.helper: Paste the address of an online image or upload one.

summary.label: Summary
summary.helper: One or two lines to recognize the recipe quickly.

note.label: Recipe note
note.helper: Optional. Useful to keep a tradeoff after testing.

errors.missingId: The recipe was saved without a usable identifier.
errors.saveFailed: Unable to save the recipe right now.
errors.coverUploadFailed: Unable to upload the image right now.
errors.coverUploadTooLarge: The image file is too large.

quickListSummary.copyEmpty: The quick list keeps its place in the flow, even before the first selection.
quickListSummary.copyFilled: The summary keeps active recipes readable from the other module screens.
quickListSummary.defaultNote: Recipe kept for an upcoming meal.

hero.title: Less mental load. More time for you.
hero.subtitle: Tribu Nova helps you organize your daily life, alone or as a couple — without overthinking it.

simplicity.title: Everything in one place
simplicity.description: Your tasks, projects, and ideas. One space so nothing gets lost.

clarity.title: A better-balanced load
clarity.description: Assign what belongs to each person. No more repeating yourself.

control.title: Less stress
control.description: When everything is organized, daily life becomes lighter.

board.title: Your daily tasks
board.description: Add, assign, track. As simple as a list, as powerful as a tool.

impact.title: Mental load is real
impact.description: It affects almost everyone. Tribu Nova helps reduce it.

time.title: Saved every week
time.description: Less coordination, fewer reminders. Your time comes back to you.

alignment.title: Of couples affected
alignment.description: Mental load touches almost every household — and strains relationships.

serenity.title: Less friction
serenity.description: When everyone knows what to do, unnecessary reminders disappear.

capture.title: Note it
capture.description: Add a task or idea as soon as it comes up, from your phone.

plan.title: Organize
plan.description: Decide who does what. Assign in two taps, plan without effort.

act.title: Move forward
act.description: Track what is done. See progress, without the stress.

trust.title: Simple. Clear. For you.
trust.description: Tribu Nova turns your ideas into concrete actions, with a shared view of your daily life.

board.title: Your daily tasks
board.description: Add, assign, track — from your phone.

cta.title: Ready to take back control?
cta.description: Start for free, no credit card needed. Your space is ready in 2 minutes.

metadata.title: Legal notice
metadata.description: Legal information, privacy, and terms of use for the Tribu Nova service.

editor.title: Website publisher
editor.appDescription: Tribu Nova is a personal family management application.
editor.hosting: Hosting: Vercel Inc. — 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.content: All content on Tribu Nova (text, interfaces, source code, logos, graphics) is protected by copyright law. Any reproduction, representation, or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior authorization is prohibited.

dataProtection.title: Personal data protection
dataProtection.intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

rights.access: Right to access your personal data
rights.deletion: Right to erasure of your data

dataProtection.collectedData: Data collected: email address, display name, user preferences.
dataProtection.purpose: Purpose: authentication, experience personalization, and service operation.
dataProtection.retention: Retention period: your data is kept as long as your account is active. It is deleted upon request.
dataProtection.exerciseRights: To exercise your rights, contact us at: contact@tribunova.app

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Tribu Nova uses only strictly necessary cookies for service operation (authentication, user session). No advertising or tracking cookies are used. These cookies are essential and do not require prior consent.

liability.title: Liability
liability.content: The publisher strives to provide a reliable and available service. However, they cannot be held liable for service interruptions, data loss, or indirect damages related to the use of the platform. The service is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable law
applicableLaw.content: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Explore Tribu Nova plans: Free, Foyer, and Foyer Plus — built for couples and families easing mental load.

header.label: Back
header.title: Our pricing
header.subtitle: Simple plans for couples and families organizing daily life together

free.name: Free
free.description: Discover Tribu Nova and organize your home life together

pro.name: Foyer
pro.description: For couples who want a clearer split of mental load and routines

team.name: Foyer Plus
team.description: For larger households and co-parents who need more coordination
team.ctaAriaLabel: Subscribe to the Foyer Plus plan

cancel.question: Can I cancel at any time?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You will keep access until the end of the current billing period.

upgrade.question: Can I change my plan?
upgrade.answer: You can upgrade to a higher plan at any time. The change takes effect immediately and the difference is prorated.

data.question: What happens to my data if I switch back to free?
data.answer: Your data is preserved. If you exceed the free plan limits, you can view your existing projects but cannot create new ones.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) and SEPA direct debits.

guarantee.title: Money-back guarantee
guarantee.description: Try Tribu Nova Foyer or Foyer Plus for 14 days. If you're not satisfied, we'll give you a full refund.

trust.title: Premium, with clear expectations
trust.item1: A solid free version to get started without friction.
trust.item2: Premium features only when you truly need them.
trust.item3: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs.

removeModal.title: Remove this member
removeModal.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the project?

upgrade.title: Feature requires {plan} plan
upgrade.description: This feature is not available on your current plan. Upgrade to {plan} to unlock it.
upgrade.ctaAriaLabel: View plans and upgrade your subscription
